name: procurement managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 contracts/month tool
description: For procurement managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We notify managers 30 days in advance instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 contracts/month
problem_solved: Missed contract renewals leading to service interruptions and potential penalties.

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 contracts/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Missed contract renewals leading to service interruptions and potential penalties.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We notify managers 30 days in advance instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of contract dates using spreadsheets

one_liner: For procurement managers in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause service interruptions. We notify managers 30 days in advance instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
